questionHtml: Outline, with reference to the curve, why it is unsafe to drive a train across the bridge at 30 m s-1 for this amount of damping.
markschemeHtml:
30 m s–1 corresponds to f = 1.2 Hz ✔

the amplitude of vibration is a maximum for this speed

OR

corresponds to the resonant frequency ✔

meta.title: Outline, with reference to the curve, why it is unsafe to drive a train across the bridge at 30 m s-1 for this amount of damping.
